headline: Airlines in bear market as oil poses ‘existential’ threat
summary: The S&P Supercomposite Airlines Industry Index closed down 4.1% on Friday afternoon, extending a skid into a sixth day.  The sharp decline in shares stems from the Iran conflict, which has caused the prices of jet fuel to surge.  Analysts worry that prices could stay high for some time as war in the Middle East drags on.

headline: UPS Repositions As AI Logistics Platform With Valuation Upside And Risks
summary: United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) is overhauling its business model toward an AI powered logistics platform and higher automation. Management is prioritizing AI driven route optimization, automated facilities, and a focus on higher margin business customers. The shift comes as the company responds to competitive pressures and ongoing labor related challenges in the parcel and freight sector. For you as an investor, this move positions UPS less as a traditional parcel carrier and more as a...

headline: UPS Market Value Lead Over FedEx Shrinks to Under $1 Billion
summary: The long-standing valuation gap between the two parcel giants tightens as UPS shares slide over 10% this week while FedEx rebounds to record highs in 2026.

headline: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order
summary: CBP told Court of International Trade Judge Richard Eaton that the total amount of IEEPA tariffs duties collected since last year is about $166 billion.

headline: U.S. payrolls unexpectedly fell by 92,000 in February; unemployment rate rises to 4.4%
summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase 50,000 in February while the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%.

headline: A Look At United Parcel Service’s Valuation After Sector Sell Off And Automation Push
summary: United Parcel Service (UPS) is back in focus after its shares fell 6% during a broad sell-off tied to rising Middle East tensions and higher oil prices, which weighed on air freight and logistics stocks. See our latest analysis for United Parcel Service. That sharp 1 day share price decline of 5.82% comes after a 7 day share price return of 10.77%, and follows a 90 day share price return of 9.70%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 7.73% and 5 year total shareholder return of 22.93% point...
